title: Diamond dupe
description: Allows you to dupe diamonds with a single diamond.
body:
This mod (data-pack) lets you duplicate diamonds via the crafting table. Just put a singular diamond in the table and you have a diamond block! You can also sneak this mod onto a server or tell your friend it is something else and get INFINITE DIAMONDS!!!

If there is a version that does not exist please email me here so i know to add it: zwhseton@gmail.com
